name: Michelangelo / Latent Structure Queries
capability_target: Latent structure recovery beyond single-needle retrieval, including coreference, latent lists, and IDK/abstention.

input_contract.metadata: paper card plus verified source pointer when found
input_contract.context: private long histories with latent list/coreference structure
input_contract.query: structural question over the hidden relation
input_contract.evidence: minimal rows that recover the latent relation
input_contract.memory_system: VCM and non-VCM baselines under equal context budgets

output_contract.answer_accuracy: exact answer, set match, or abstention
output_contract.abstention: IDK when latent structure is absent
output_contract.residuals: relation synthesis miss, wrong order, wrong coreference, or false answer

smoke_steps: verify official source URL and license
admit only deterministic local scoring lanes
contamination_policy: Use Michelangelo only as public calibration once official source/license/evaluator are verified. Private analogues may mirror LSQ task families without copying public items or templates.
regression_policy: If mastered, keep latent-structure private rows in regression and preserve public LSQ admission state separately.

permission_envelope.memory: private analogue contexts only until official source is admitted
permission_envelope.tools: local loaders, scorers, and report writers

teacher_role: No teacher solving or public-item explanation.
